I thought about things that have happened in CSS in 2025 and what I think you should probably know.  

Then I blogged it on @FrontendMasters.

https://frontendmasters.com/blog/what-you-need-to-know-about-modern-css-2025-edition/

It's not *everything* — it's my own curated list.

Gonna fiddle (on a stream) of making my own opinionated CSS reset. 

https://www.twitch.tv/chriscoyier

RT by @chriscoyier: Scope in CSS 

We've got @scope in CSS now, and it's got it's uses. But the concept of scope in CSS is a wider idea. 

https://frontendmasters.com/blog/scope-in-css

RT by @chriscoyier: ✨ New article is live: CSS Spotlight Effect

I asked myself what we could do with just the mouse position, and got to this fun simple effect.

Hope you enjoy it, and maybe it will spark some new ideas for you too. 😊

🔗 Check it out on @FrontendMasters: https://frontendmasters.com/blog/css-spotlight-effect/
